Description: AC or DC line, Transformer, Converter
Voltage of the line (e.g., 400, 220 kV, 220/400 kV if transformer)
Maximum flow of a transmission line between 2 regions (i.e. aggregate-regions, countries, nuts1, nuts2, nuts3, or nodes). Total transfer capacity (TTC). (maximum permissible thermal load)
Security factor to consider approximately N-1 contingencies. NTC = TTC x SecurityFactor
Fixed cost of the line. Overnight investment (capital) cost

Fixed charge rate to annualize the overnight investment cost. The Fixed Charge Rate (FCR) is the percentage of the total investment cost that is required over the project life per year to cover the minimal annual revenue requirements.
